creator: chris@calldei.com
text:
To make the handbook work like Nik's doc tutorial, I've changed many
contractions to their respective expanded meanings.

To keep the documentation up with the software, I have also updated the
__FreeBSD_version table to include the latest -CURRENT changes and the
introduction of 3.2-STABLE.

How-To-Repeat: 
http://www.freebsd.org/handbook/ports.html
